channel.title: Org on My Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Org on My Personal Blog

item.title: summary
item.description: Introduction please ignore the ‘,’ at the beggining. #+TITLE: No matter uppercase or not #+AUTHOR: me Heading * the first heading ** second *** third ** TODO every heading can be a TODO Annotation bold italic underline delete code code List itemize - item1 + item2 item item enumerate 1. item-1 2) item-2 A. item-A B) item-B first second aa bb - [ ] not started - [-] in process - [X] finished not started [-] in process finished Links [[https://google.
